commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 08 July

NYSE dominates with the tightest liquidity profile across all metrics, particularly its exceptionally low ILLIQ score of 0.0014, reflecting minimal price impact per million units traded. Conversely, LSE ranks last with ILLIQ deteriorating to 0.1282—nearly 92 times higher than NYSE—alongside elevated Roll and AR spreads of 1.31% and 0.84% respectively. Notably, Nasdaq 100's paradoxically low ILLIQ masks a substantial 1.72% Roll spread, suggesting liquidity concentration among large trades rather than consistent depth.
